lastReleaseMessage: library grid: drop minmax floor from 78px to 64px so it doesn't collapse to one column in narrow editor panels; add min-width:0 safeguard

barRaise.topFinding: Fourth consecutive bar-raise and the loop is still open, but today a commit fired: 28fe3cd add .project-context.json (2026-05-29), the first commit since v0.15.8, added a clean portfolio-metadata file while leaving all four untracked review reports untracked beside it. So the audit-loop-integrity HIGH hardened from "nothing is firing" to "a commit fired and stepped past the review outputs": the loop is actively bypassed, not idle. Everything else is byte-identical to yesterday: 37 em-dashes across six public files, html2canvas still CDN-loaded, PROJECT_SPEC 4.4/4.5/11 still pre-v0.15, README still pitches 20 herbs vs a live 199, and write-dashboard-status.ps1 still clobbers barRaise and audit findings on every release. The app is healthy; the remediation pipeline around it is not self-correcting and needs a human to drain it once or fix the handoff.
